## What It Does

Vue.js + TypeScript UI framework for Hytale modding via Javet bridge. Single-file Vue components with full TypeScript autocompletion, reactive data binding, and compilation to HyUI-compatible output. Pre-release (core Javet integration done, actual Hytale rendering still in progress).

## What We Use

- **Reference** — study Vue-to-HyUI compilation patterns, reactive state management approaches
- **Ecosystem awareness** — potential future UI development workflow

## Our Integration

No direct integration. Used as a reference and tracked for ecosystem evolution.

## Update Instructions

```bash
./external/scripts/update-externals.sh vuetale
```
